name: Review Reply Pack
buyer_pain: Local businesses need review replies but do not have time or confidence to write them consistently.
why_overlooked: It does not look like AI work, but AI can speed up drafting while the human controls tone and judgment.
paid_upgrade_options: Grammarly Pro only if doing repeated writing work
boundary_note: Draft replies only. Do not write fake reviews and do not request account access.
what_not_to_promise: Do not promise higher ratings or ranking changes.

name: PDF Cleanup Pack
buyer_pain: Useful business information is trapped in PDFs, menus, old lists, and forms.
why_overlooked: It is boring cleanup work, so many people skip it even though buyers need it finished.
smallest_paid_offer: One small PDF converted into a clean spreadsheet.
paid_upgrade_options: Paid OCR only for scanned or messy PDFs
boundary_note: Confirm file size and sensitivity before starting.
what_not_to_promise: Do not promise perfect extraction from poor scans before inspecting the file.

name: FAQ Draft Pack
buyer_pain: Small businesses answer the same customer questions repeatedly.
why_overlooked: It feels basic, but it immediately saves the owner time.
what_not_to_promise: Do not give regulated advice or unsupported guarantees.

name: Canva Cleanup Pack
buyer_pain: The business has a rough flyer or handout that is hard to read or looks unprofessional.
why_overlooked: It is cleanup, not full design agency work, so it is easier to package and sell.
smallest_paid_offer: Clean up one flyer or one-page handout.
paid_upgrade_options: Canva Pro only if premium assets or brand kit work is needed
boundary_note: Use buyer-provided assets or clearly licensed assets.
what_not_to_promise: Do not promise ad performance or full brand strategy.

name: Workflow Map Before Automation
buyer_pain: The buyer wants automation but cannot clearly explain the repeated process.
why_overlooked: Everyone talks about automation, but the useful first step is simply writing the process down.
smallest_paid_offer: One-page workflow map with trigger, inputs, steps, outputs, and failure points.
paid_upgrade_options: Paid automation tools only after workflow is clear
boundary_note: This is planning, not a promise to build the final automation.
what_not_to_promise: Do not promise a full automation build in the mapping package.
